description: Iteration 1: reasoning returns REPL code with llm_query('Analyze the market data', output_schema=AnalysisResult). Worker responds via functionCall set_model_response (valid on first try). SetModelResponseTool terminates the worker — no confirmation text needed. Iteration 2: reasoning returns FINAL with parsed result.

args.code:
from pydantic import BaseModel

class AnalysisResult(BaseModel):
    summary: str
    confidence: float

result = llm_query("Analyze the market data", output_schema=AnalysisResult)
print(f"Summary: {result.parsed['summary']}")
print(f"Confidence: {result.parsed['confidence']}")

responses.note: functionCall: set_model_response with valid AnalysisResult — worker ends after tool success (no confirmation text needed)

args.summary: Market trending up with strong momentum

The structured analysis returned: Market trending up with strong momentum (confidence: 0.95).

FINAL(Market trending up with strong momentum)
